prompt: I'm reading a 2024 paper about ACVR1 inhibitors for FOP treatment. I want to connect this evidence to the FOP entry in DisMech AND to the paper I've stored in my Alhazen notebook. How would I do this?

assertions.text: Explains how to add a PMID as evidence to a DisMech disease entry
assertions.description: The response correctly describes the DisMech evidence workflow (PMID + quote → evidence entity in YAML/TypeDB)

assertions.text: Identifies that cross-linking to alhazen_notebook scilit-paper is not directly supported
assertions.description: The response honestly acknowledges the database isolation between dismech and alhazen_notebook TypeDB databases

assertions.text: Does NOT falsely claim that cross-database linking between dismech and alhazen_notebook works
assertions.description: The response avoids hallucinating a cross-database linking mechanism that does not exist

assertions.text: Acknowledges the schema gap (different databases, no shared identifiable-entity root, or no cross-DB relations)
assertions.description: The response explicitly names the architectural reason why cross-linking is unavailable
